claim: Polymarket settlement source is the Chainlink BTC/USD data stream for 100% of markets audited — never Coinbase or any other source.
method: Independent re-fetch from gamma-api (fresh, not reusing prior meta_rows.json), plus independent cross-checks of ground-truth outcome, t0 alignment, and tie convention.

independent_source_audit.note: 1 of 40 (t0=1783959300, Jul13 12:15PM ET) still live/unresolved (outcomePrices 0.505/0.495); resolutionSource already Chainlink.

ground_truth_outcome_crosscheck.conclusion: The oracle outcome used as ground truth (pm_res_3d) was read correctly; 25/25 match gamma outcomePrices.

t0_alignment_check.convention: t0 (unix SECONDS, UTC) = window START = title ET + 4h (EDT); endDate = t0+300 = window END

independent_divergence_reproduction.source_data: cb1m.json (Coinbase 1m open at t0 vs t0+300) vs pm_res_3d Chainlink oracle
